title: rubus vexatus var. subtiliaceus
intro: Rubus vexatus var. subtiliaceus, also known as the prickly raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus vexatus plant, which is a species of raspberry native to the subtropical regions of China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Rubus vexatus var. subtiliaceus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate pain, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and it is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
